name: chrY_P1_palindrome
description: Y-chromosome palindrome P1. Largest palindrome, harbors AZFc, b2/b4 NAHR substrate. Arm length ~1450 kb at 99.97% identity, spacer ~2.1 kb. Mediates intra-chromosomal NAHR and gene conversion.

architecture.internal_structure: genes: DAZ1, DAZ2, DAZ3, DAZ4, BPY2, CDY1, TTTY, PRY, CSPG4P1Y

recurrence_evidence.tumor_recurrence: Y loss in clonal hematopoiesis enriched in carriers

sources: Lange et al 2008/2009 Cell + Genome Res Y SD map
Mueller et al 2008 Genome Res Y architecture
